scripts.build: npm run build -w @lazytax/core && npm run build -w @lazytax/engine && npm run build -w @lazytax/mcp && npm run build:plugin
scripts.build:runtime: npm run build -w @lazytax/core && npm run build -w @lazytax/engine && npm run build -w @lazytax/mcp
scripts.test: npm run test -w @lazytax/core && npm run test -w @lazytax/engine && npm run test -w @lazytax/mcp && npm run test:viewer
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run preflight:plugin && npm run smoke:plugin
scripts.verify:plugin: npm run build:plugin && npm run preflight:plugin && npm run smoke:plugin
